title: 'Thank you, darling': Trump storms out of NBC interview after calling interviewer 'stupid' - video
summary_full: Donald Trump abruptly ended a "Meet the Press" interview with Kristen Welker, accusing her and major news networks of being "crooked" and "stupid" after she pressed him for evidence of election fraud. Trump also defended his "anti-weaponisation fund" proposal, claiming political prosecutions have destroyed lives.
